## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Change type

- [ ] Template update
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Checklist update
- [ ] Example update
- [ ] Safety or privacy update
- [ ] Repository maintenance

## Scope

List the files or workflows affected by this change.

## Safety checklist

- [ ] This change does not include secrets, tokens, passwords, private emails, customer data, or production configuration.
- [ ] Side-effect operations are documented with target, payload or operation details, impact scope, and rollback plan.
- [ ] Any App Store, TestFlight, GitHub release, deployment, billing, or production operation remains human-confirmed.
- [ ] Rollback or recovery guidance is included where relevant.

## Verification

Describe the local checks performed.

## Linked issue

Link the related issue, if any.

## Notes for reviewers

Call out any tradeoffs, known limitations, or follow-up work.
